message:
Extend autograd API test coverage with 291 additional test lines

Comprehensive test expansion for the tensor autograd introspection API
covering additional edge cases: multi-hook ordering guarantees, hook
modification during backward pass, detach-then-reattach sequences,
nested no_grad scope interactions with requires_grad_ toggles, and
gradient accumulation across repeated backward calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
